title: cryptogramma japonica
intro: Cryptogramma japonica, also known as the Japanese rockfoil, is a type of fern native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cryptogramma japonica include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, it has been prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for topical application, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
